findings.issue: useSyncStatus() called as separate instances — markSynced() in Tasks never updates Navbar's instance; Navbar drifts to disconnected after ~60s regardless of actual Electric state
findings.citation: Navbar.tsx:17: const { syncStatus } = useSyncStatus(); Tasks.tsx:50: const { markSynced } = useSyncStatus(); Each component gets its own ref via useState/useRef — refs are not shared
findings.remediation: Lift useSyncStatus into a React Context (SyncStatusContext) and call markSynced from Tasks; Navbar reads from context

findings.issue: enqueueMutation read-modify-write is not atomic — two concurrent calls both read the same queue and one mutation is silently dropped
findings.citation: mutation-queue.ts:18-24: const queue = await get<MutationEntry[]>(QUEUE_KEY); ... await set(QUEUE_KEY, updated); No lock prevents interleaving
findings.remediation: Add a serialization queue: enqueueMutation pushes to a Promise chain so only one write happens at a time

findings.issue: SC4 guard resolves to main frontend/ dir, not remote-frontend/ — validates wrong codebase
findings.citation: sc4-guard.spec.ts:10: const FRONTEND_ROOT = path.resolve(__dirname, '../../frontend'); remote-frontend/e2e/sc4-guard.spec.ts → __dirname is remote-frontend/e2e/, so ../../frontend = frontend/ not remote-frontend/
findings.remediation: Change to path.resolve(__dirname, '../../') to point to remote-frontend/ root

findings.issue: Undo button in delete toast shows non-functional message — non-functional action presented as actionable
findings.citation: Tasks.tsx:confirmDelete: toast('Task deleted', { action: { label: 'Undo', onClick: () => toast.success('Undo not available for this task') }, duration: 5000 })
findings.remediation: Remove the Undo action entirely since there is no restore API — just show a plain success toast

findings.issue: idb-keyval mock closure variable store persists across tests; vi.clearAllMocks() doesn't reset it — test isolation broken
findings.citation: mutation-queue.test.ts:3-11: mock closure variable persists between tests
findings.remediation: Add beforeEach(() => { store = {}; }) in the test file to reset the idb-keyval mock store between tests

findings.issue: board.spec.ts PATCH test asserts synchronously after click() before async PATCH completes — intermittently flaky
findings.citation: board.spec.ts:74: expect(patchBody).not.toBeNull() fires immediately after click, before the mocked route handler runs
findings.remediation: Add await page.waitForResponse(...) or await expect polling before asserting patchBody

findings.issue: useSyncStatus hook (interval, event listeners, markSynced) has zero unit test coverage — only getSyncStatus function tested
findings.citation: sync-status.test.ts: only tests exports getSyncStatus pure function; no hook tests
findings.remediation: Add renderHook tests for useSyncStatus: initial state synced, markSynced updates ref, interval transitions, online/offline events

findings.issue: getSyncStatus(null) branch is dead code — hook initialises lastUpdateRef to Date.now(), never passes null
findings.citation: sync-status.ts:4-5: if (lastUpdateAt === null) return 'synced'; hook line: lastUpdateRef.current = Date.now()
findings.remediation: Remove the null branch or change the ref initialization to null

findings.issue: setupTaskApiMocks imported but never called in board.spec.ts
findings.citation: board.spec.ts:3: import { setupTaskApiMocks } from './fixtures/mock-api' — never called in any test
findings.remediation: Remove the unused import: { setupApiMocks, setupNodesApiMocks }
